goal: Disposable seeded-pair smoke proving pair --manager-* launches a preconfigured manager that starts supervising from cycle.

acceptance_criteria: Manager first behavior after launch is scripts/workerctl cycle qa-seeded-pair-smoke, not manager-config --questions.
Manager uses scripts/workerctl session-nudge qa-seeded-pair-worker to request the proof artifact.
Worker creates only .codex-workers/qa-seeded-pair-worker/seeded-pair-proof.txt and reports git status output.
Manager verifies evidence, satisfies durable accepted criteria, and finishes with no active sessions.
guidelines: Manager config is already recorded. Do not ask setup questions first; start with scripts/workerctl cycle qa-seeded-pair-smoke.
Use scripts/workerctl session-nudge qa-seeded-pair-worker for worker communication.
If cycle output has no durable accepted criteria rows, add accepted criteria rows matching manager_config.acceptance_criteria before finish.
Do not edit product implementation files.
manager_config.objective: Supervise the seeded-pair smoke from already-recorded config. Prove startup begins with cycle, then nudge the worker, verify evidence, satisfy durable accepted criteria, and finish cleanly.

name: qa-seeded-pair-smoke
summary: GoalBuddy-run QA smoke for seeded manager config startup behavior.
